title: Song Story Remix
description: A song-story remix game where kids choose silly animals and bus riders for familiar tune prompts.
learningGoals: Play with verse structure in familiar songs
Match sound words to animals and characters
interactionModel: choose-one tap cards after a spoken prompt
feedbackModel: Warm spoken praise and sparkle SFX on success; a miss gets a gentle wiggle, spoken nudge, and the prompt again.

modes.title: Remix the Farm
modes.skill: song verse and animal sound play

modes.title: Remix the Bus
modes.skill: song verse and rider sound play

credits: Built with Codex for QLOBE Kids.
